title: tragia leptorhachis
intro: Tragia leptorhachis is a plant species known for its medicinal properties and is commonly referred to as a medicinal or poisonous plant. The plant is a type of spurge native to tropical Africa, and its leaves and stems contain a toxic sap. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal remedies to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations. Preparations of Tragia leptorhachis include infusions of the leaves and roots, which can be used to treat pain and inflammation.
